reviews.review_description: Great idea I just can't get past the very beginning. It says, "Internet connection required" even though I can surf the web & stream movies. App won't load.

Was hoping to potentially use this app for some of my patients as I have taken a few courses on VR rehabilitation. Was very disappointed to find out I can't get past the "connect wifi". Please try to fix as I would love to try this out!

reviews.review_title: Not working. Sad because I need it
reviews.review_description: My husband is bedridden and brain damaged from a stroke. He likes the VR for simple things. I have been looking for new therapeutic  ways for him to reconnect to the world. But the no internet error message means no go.
Wish there was a way to totally delete this from my gallery it’s never worked there’s more fun in the welcome to vr app
My device is connected to the internet, but I can’t use the app because the app keeps telling me I need internet connection.
its interestig but sometetime cause trouble in getting started with

developer_response.body: thank you very much for your feedback. Would you be so kind and send us an email to. info@rewellio.com and tell us a bit more about your troubles? we are looking forward to investigate the issue. Best, Georg

reviews.review_title: same issue as others  says no wifi

reviews.review_description:
Never got to connect to my WIFI. Everything else connects except Rewellio. 
I’ve gone through trouble shooting steps with no luck. 
I’m very frustrated so far. I’m looking forward to working with this app as part of my therapy.
I can’t get passed needs internet connection. This was the reason why I bought this and the app doesn’t work.
